profile_backed_target.command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-post-lu-profile cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/ --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 1 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot
profile_backed_target.selection_reason: Post-pass122 profile made eig the slowest remaining fj-lax linalg benchmark after LU dropped to 0.548 ms.

alien_graveyard.primitive_family: cache-local dense linear algebra update scheduling
alien_graveyard.source: /data/projects/alien_cs_graveyard/alien_cs_graveyard.md section 9.6 CA-QR/TSQR and cache-local dense submatrix kernels
alien_graveyard.applied_slice: Tried an eig-local small GEMM write-elision layout before replacing the eig primitive family.

candidate.one_lever: Replace eig helper matrix_mul and upper_triangular_matrix_mul repeated row updates with four-column scalar cell accumulators.
candidate.source_state_after_rejection: restored; git diff is empty for crates/fj-lax/src/linalg.rs
candidate.reason: Same-worker candidate regressed the profiled eig benchmark from 17.361 ms to 21.897 ms.

candidate_rebench.command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-pass123-eig-mul-candidate cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/eig_48x48_f64 --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 1 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

score.rationale: The one-lever candidate slowed the profile-backed target and was removed.

candidate_test_commands.command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-pass123-eig-mul-proof2 cargo test -p fj-lax matrix_mul -- --nocapture

RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-pass123-eig-iter-proof cargo test -p fj-lax eig_qr_iteration_upper_triangular_rq_bit_identical_to_dense_reference -- --nocapture

behavior_proof.ordering: Candidate accumulated each output cell in ascending k order; retained code has no source diff.
behavior_proof.tie_breaking: No comparator or tie-breaking path was changed; retained code has no source diff.
behavior_proof.floating_point: Candidate preserved per-cell f64 operation order, but the retained tree has no source diff after rejection.
behavior_proof.rng: No RNG state or random primitive is involved.
behavior_proof.errors: Arity, square-matrix, dtype extraction, and Complex128 wrapping behavior are unchanged; retained code has no source diff.

next_primitive.primitive: shifted/deflated QR over a packed Hessenberg real layout, gated by an explicit eig floating-point behavior contract
next_primitive.reason: A second eig micro-shape change regressed or failed the keep gate; the next pass must replace the algorithmic primitive instead of tuning the existing dense helper update.
